english: Here lies the maker of verse; approach only if your own spirit is clean.
spanish: Aquí yace el hacedor de versos; acércate sólo si tu propio espíritu está limpio.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.3
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII. Short working rendering from Greek/English witness.

english: Youth is spent defending a homeland from enslavement.
spanish: La juventud se gasta defendiendo una patria de la esclavitud.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.4
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII. Short working rendering.

artifact: Greek Anthology XIII.10 — Ship and Light
original: ἃ ναῦς, ἃ τὸ μόνον φέγγος ἐμὶν τὸ γλυκὺ τᾶς ζωᾶς ἅρπαξας.
english: O ship, you carried away the single sweet light of a life.
spanish: Oh nave, te llevaste la única dulce luz de una vida.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.10
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII. Fragmentary epigram; short working rendering.

original: Ἐρρέτω ἦμαρ ἐκεῖνο, καὶ οὐλομένη σκοτόμαινα.
english: Cursed be that day and the moonless night that drove the ship to ruin.
spanish: Malditos aquel día y aquella noche sin luna que empujaron la nave a la ruina.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.12
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII.12. Short working rendering.

artifact: Greek Anthology XIII.14 — Dandes of Argos
english: Here lies the runner whose victories made his city visible.
spanish: Aquí yace el corredor cuyas victorias hicieron visible a su ciudad.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.14
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII.14. Short working rendering.

artifact: Greek Anthology XIII.15 — Dicon Crowns Syracuse
english: The victor's crown returns to the city that formed him.
spanish: La corona del vencedor vuelve a la ciudad que lo formó.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.15
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII.15. Short working rendering.

original: μόναν δέ με φημι γυναικῶν Ἑλλάδος ἐκ πάσας τόνδε λαβεῖν στέφανον.
english: She names herself the only woman in Greece to take this crown.
spanish: Ella se nombra como la única mujer de Grecia que tomó esta corona.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.16
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII.16. Short working rendering.

english: The maker signs not with praise, but with the hand that made.
spanish: El artífice firma no con elogio, sino con la mano que hizo.
recommendedEditionSource: W. R. Paton — Greek Anthology, Vol. V, Book XIII.17
notes: Mode A queue from digitized Paton PDF, Book XIII.17. Short working rendering.
